subcodes.first_line: A Book revealed in truth for a people who understand. Verily, it hath been sent down from God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, guiding mankind unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق لقوم یفقهون انه نزل من لدی الله المهیمن القیوم یهدی الناس الی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital, @prophecy and fulfillment, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
